title: Origins: Architect Origin
description: An Origin for builders. And people who like glass?
body:
An Origins Datapack featuring an origin primarily for builders.

**This is coded for 1.20.1. Requires [Origins (1.10.0)](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins/version/1.10.0)**

# Architect
**A group of Ancient Builders that have survived by turning their bodies into... glass? Wait, really? They couldn't think of _anything_ better?**
## Power List

> **Cube:** A truly powerful shape. [3 Modes] + [2 Utility]

>  Modes:
> 1. Displacement: Temporarily Displace a 3x3x3 area for 5 seconds. [3 charges]
> 2. Break: Break a 3x3x3 area. CD is based on the hardness of blocks broken & the max level you've reached in this life.
> 3. Stasis Lock: The same as Displace but also temporarily traps entities in Stasis.
 
> Utility:
> 1. Storage: Open up a Dimensional Storage
> 2. Crafting: Opens the Crafting GUI


> **Builder's Domain:** Create a Room where you can freely move through space.

> **Spatial Stride:** Sneak Jumping in the air will create a moving platform under you. A second jump will remove the platform. This can be used up to 3 times before needing to land.
> 
> **Spatial Hand:** Extends block reach by 5 blocks.

> **Glass Heart:** You have 20 glass hearts; however, your natural regen is much slower unless in stasis.
> 
> **And Stomach:** You don't need to eat anything. Well, you can't digest anything.

> **Fragile:** Move with caution. You take much more Kinetic, Projectile and Suffocation damage.
>
> **Cracks:** You take 6% more damage and regen 5% slower per shattered heart.

If you want to give any feedback or see possible updates! [Origins Server: Datapack Post](https://discord.com/channels/734127708488859831/1400872090097160192)
